title: scorzoneroides autumnalis
intro: Scorzoneroides autumnalis, also known as Devil's-bit scabious or Autumn knapweed, is a perennial plant in the Asteraceae family. Its roots, leaves, and flowers are used in herbal medicine, particularly for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to relieve pain, reduce swelling, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, such as bloating and irritable bowel syndrome. Scorzoneroides autumnalis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in ointments and salves to enhance wound healing and skin health.
